steps: Log in with your Notion account
Enter a name for your integration and select the associated workspace
Go to the 'Configuration' tab of your new integration
Copy the 'Internal Integration Secret' (your API key)
In your Notion workspace, open the page or database you want to access
Click the '...' menu, go to 'Connections', and connect your integration

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Integration Secret
credential_fields.description: Your Notion internal integration secret, used as a Bearer token in the Authorization header

notes: Free to create integrations — no paid plan required
You must explicitly connect the integration to each page or database you want it to access
The Notion API requires a 'Notion-Version' header (latest: 2022-06-28)
Public OAuth integrations are also available for broader distribution

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve the bot user associated with the integration token
